summary: Complete testing of column deletion feature. Both backend APIs (PUT/GET /api/config/columns with removed_default_columns) and frontend column manager functionality (delete X button for ALL columns, persistence after reload) working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings for nested span/tr/th/td elements - non-blocking but should be addressed

tests.test: PUT /api/config/columns handles both custom and removed_defaults
PUT /api/config/columns requires admin role (401/403 for invalid)
Removing default column persists after reload
Cleanup column config to default state
Column manager panel opens with Settings gear button
Delete (X) button shown for ALL columns (not just custom)
Delete button for 'notes' default column - FOUND
Delete button for 'order_number' default column - FOUND
Delete button for 'client' default column - FOUND
Deleting default column removes it immediately
Deleted default column persists after page reload

behaviors: Stores removed_default_columns in MongoDB column_config collection
Requires admin role (returns 401/403 for invalid credentials)

features: Delete (X) button shown for ALL columns (default + custom)
21 columns with 21 delete buttons (all columns deletable)
Persistence after page reload (removed_default_columns stored in DB)
Modal opens with 'Agregar Nueva Columna' title
NOMBRE input field for column name

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console: nested <span> inside <tr>/<tbody> - doesn't break functionality but should be addressed for clean console output
seed_data_creation: Test user with admin role created for column config testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Column deletion feature fully working. PUT /api/config/columns now accepts 'removed_default_columns' array. GET /api/config/columns returns this field. Frontend column manager shows delete (X) button for ALL columns. Deleting a default column adds its key to removed_default_columns array and persists after page reload. Custom column deletion still works as before.
